personalInfo.name: Milind Murmu
personalInfo.title: Software Developer
personalInfo.bio: Passionate developer with expertise in building modern web applications. I love creating elegant solutions to complex problems and turning ideas into reality through code.

1.description: Building distributed backend systems and scalable micro-frontends for enterprise products at Infosys.

roles.title: Specialist Programmer
roles.description: Engineering high-throughput backend systems and orchestrating cloud-native deployments.
highlightPoints: Scaled distributed microservices to handle 10,000+ daily requests by engineering backend systems in Go and Java, collaborating with senior engineers to ensure high-throughput inter-service communication.
Architected modular Micro-Frontends (MFEs) using React, enabling independent deployments and component reuse across multiple internal teams.
Delivered features end-to-end across the SDLC by gathering requirements, designing system architecture, and writing scalable, reusable code following SOLID principles and Clean Architecture patterns.
Reduced troubleshooting time by 30% by integrating the LGTM observability stack (Loki, Grafana, Tempo, Prometheus) and centralizing log streaming from Go microservices for real-time analytics.
Maintained 99.9% uptime and reduced manual deployment effort by 30% by containerizing services with Docker and orchestrating MFE deployments on an RKE2 Rancher Kubernetes cluster.
Secured 500+ users across 4 independently scaled product modules by implementing robust authentication and authorization using Keycloak OAuth 2.
Received an Excellence Award for technical impact after presenting engineering innovations and high-availability solutions to senior leadership during internal hackathons.

roles.title: Specialist Programmer Intern
roles.description: Delivered full-stack features and secured a Pre-Placement Offer for outstanding performance.
highlightPoints: Delivered 10+ secure REST APIs by developing core backend microservices using Spring Boot and seamlessly integrating them with React TypeScript frontend applications.

Standardized artifact delivery for Spring Boot microservices and a React 19 Vite frontend by authoring production-grade Dockerfiles and publishing versioned images to the corporate JFrog Artifactory registry, enabling consistent pull-ready deployments across all development environments.
Evaluated cloud-native object storage by deploying MinIO on a Linux VM and building an end-to-end service integration POC, validating S3-compatible storage feasibility ahead of production planning.

Enforced fine-grained access control on a Vite TypeScript frontend by integrating Keycloak OAuth 2.0 with RBAC, restricting route and feature access based on user roles across multiple application modules.
Secured a Pre-Placement Offer (PPO) for outstanding performance and delivering critical project milestones ahead of schedule during the 5-month internship.

1.title: Saral Rozgar
1.description: A WhatsApp-native job-matching chatbot for blue-collar workers in India. Supports GPS-based job discovery with the Haversine formula, NLP-powered one-shot query parsing via Google Gemini AI, multilingual conversations, voice messages, text-to-speech (gTTS), and a full job management menu — all over WhatsApp.

2.title: CGC Placements
2.description: A full-stack college placement app with real-time company visit notifications, a student dashboard with placement analytics, dynamic GPA and graduation-year eligibility filtering, secure JWT + bcrypt authentication, and a fully responsive Tailwind CSS UI.
